ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Status), TEXT(Status) = "Plan Enrollment", OR( NOT(Applied_for_Medicare_Part_A_B__c), NOT(Medicare_card_received__c), NOT(Part_B_premium_auto_draft_confirmed__c), NOT(PCP_drug_list_collected__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Complete all Medicare A & B requirements before moving to Plan Enrollment.
